title: Better Hoes
description: Makes the hoe more useful by adding more things it can mine.
body:
Goblins and ghouls it is I Ender!

Once again I have created something marvelous!
Yes I have made the common hoe useful again!

Now you can break all the plant blocks with it.

[![Kinetic Partner Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1a434cb888cd675034184ac4173bb6e379e5f3a.png) Click on the banner or here to support me and my projects! :)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=853)
